# Enigmatic S Documentation

## Site Structure
- /: Home Page - Overview of Nodal platform
- /docs: Documentation Hub
  - /docs#overview: Introduction to Flow Studio and Action Flows
  - /docs#concepts: Core concepts (Nodes, Edges, Expressions)
  - /docs#trigger-api: API Trigger documentation
  - /docs#human-task: Human Task node documentation
  - /docs#wait-for-event: Wait for Event node documentation
  - /docs#http-request: HTTP Request node documentation
  - /docs#correlation: Correlation Signals documentation
  - /docs#set-variable: Set Variable node documentation
  - /docs#condition: Condition logic documentation
  - /docs#switch: Switch logic documentation
  - /docs#loop: Loop logic documentation
  - /docs#filter: Filter logic documentation
  - /docs#map: Map logic documentation
  - /docs#expressions: Expression syntax guide

## Content Summary
Nodal is an operational orchestration platform. Key features include:
- Visual Flow Studio for building processes
- Action Flows for tracking running instances
- Human-in-the-loop tasks integration
- External API triggers and webhooks

## API Endpoints
- POST https://enigmatic.works/api/flows/{flowId}/execute
- POST https://enigmatic.works/api/webhooks/{token}
